meta.produkt: Drapek - deska do scierania pazurow psa z szuflada na smakolyki (Ali white-label)
meta.archetype: gadzet-handsPOV (ANIMAL-AS-PERFORMER: pies = performer/twarz, kanoniczny dog-ref corgi warunkuje wszystkie sceny)
meta.silniki: wszystkie sceny flf (Kling 2.5 first+last) - brak mowiacej twarzy, brak omnihuman/mc; ruch psa animowany parami first->last, dog-ref jako tozsamosc. n=2 tylko na scenie SCRATCH (ruch zwierzecia = ryzyko fizyki analogiczne do plynow).
meta.bramki_tomka: tryb autonomiczny - self-accept operatora z uzasadnieniem w raporcie (retro-akceptacja); realna bramka = qa_gate per klip

wzorzec.hook_type: problem-first / callout ('if your dog HATES their nails trimmed...') + satisfying dog-digging ASMR
wzorzec.audio_character: raw-diegetic + luzne-gadanie-tworcy: sygnaturowy dzwiek = PAZURY DRAPIACE po szorstkiej desce (ASMR kopania) + zsuw drewnianej pokrywy + chrupanie karmy; pod tym cichy ambient salonu. Dzwiek produktu (drapanie) NIE MOZE wypasc z pipeline'u.

on_screen_text.text: (ANGIELSKIE napisy wzorca - NIE kopiowac; nasze VO po polsku)

loop.jak: wzorzec nie zapetlal - my domykamy petle kompozycyjnie

wzorzec.reaction_sound: satysfakcja = ASMR drapania + chrup karmy (dowod reakcji psa DZWIEKIEM, nie doklejona twarza czlowieka)
wzorzec.comment_driver: pies sam 'prosi' o pilowanie pazurow jak o zabawe; slady zarysowan na czarnej powierzchni = widoczny dowod

hook_design.typ_kreacji: problem-first / specific-outcome (pies w panice przy obcinaczkach) - jasny wysokokontrastowy kadr; ruch juz w klatce 1 (pies cofa lape)
hook_design._bramka: hook jasny, produkt/pies duzy w kadrze, ruch od klatki 1, zero intro - OK

sceny.first_frame_brief_en: BRIGHT high-key home living-room floor, warm daylight, cream sofa blurred behind; the canonical tan-and-white corgi sits on light-oak floor and PULLS its front paw back, head turned away, ears pinned back, uneasy, as a human hand holds shiny metal nail clippers approaching its paw; no board yet
sceny.last_frame_brief_en: SAME bright framing and corgi: the dog has flinched further away from the clippers, paw lifted off, head turned more, clearly avoiding - the clippers still in the hand
sceny.motion_prompt_en: the corgi flinches and pulls its paw away from the approaching metal clippers, turning its head aside with ears back, gentle handheld micro-drift, bright airy room, no morphing, exactly one dog with four legs
sceny.vo_pl: Moj pies wpadal w panike, gdy tylko wyciagalem obcinaczki.
sceny._cut: tnij gdy pies odwraca glowe (apogeum unikania)

sceny.first_frame_brief_en: SAME bright room and corgi: a human hand lowers the unbranded Drapek board (coarse black abrasive top, pale blonde wood body, sliding black lid with black pull-loop) onto the light-oak floor in front of the dog; the corgi's ears perk up, curious
sceny.last_frame_brief_en: SAME framing: the board now rests flat on the floor, the corgi leans in sniffing it, ears up, interested; plain blonde wood edge, no logo
sceny.motion_prompt_en: the hand sets the scratch board flat on the floor and withdraws, the corgi leans in and sniffs it with ears perked, subtle handheld micro-drift, bright room, keep the exact board shape and count, no text on the wood
sceny.vo_pl: Az dostal deske, ktora obsluguje sam.
sceny._cut: match-on-action: reka wychodzi z kadru gdy pies wchodzi

sceny.first_frame_brief_en: CLOSER bright shot on the board on the floor: the corgi's tan-and-white front paw pressed on the top edge of the coarse black abrasive surface, claws down, about to drag; a few faint pale scratch streaks already on the black surface
sceny.last_frame_brief_en: SAME close framing: the paw has dragged down and back across the black surface leaving fresh pale scratch streaks, claws visibly filing on the abrasive top, the other front paw lifting to scratch next
sceny.motion_prompt_en: the corgi vigorously digs and scratches the coarse black abrasive board with its front paws, alternating, claws dragging down and back leaving pale streaks, natural energetic canine digging on the floor plane, subtle handheld, exactly one dog four legs no extra paws, no morphing, sharp rigid board
sceny.vo_pl: Sam pituje pazurki, drapiac jak do zabawy.

sfx.cue: SYGNATUROWE drapanie pazurow po szorstkiej desce (ASMR, glosniej niz muzyka)

sceny._cut: APOGEUM: tnij w trakcie ruchu drapania (match-on-action)

sceny.first_frame_brief_en: SAME bright board on the floor, corgi beside it: a human hand grips the black pull-loop at the corner of the sliding lid, starting to slide it back; the treat well still mostly covered
sceny.last_frame_brief_en: SAME framing: the black lid has slid back revealing the pale wooden well with brown kibble treats inside; the corgi dips its nose in to take a treat
sceny.motion_prompt_en: the hand pulls the black loop and the black lid slides horizontally open revealing kibble in the wooden well, then the corgi noses in to grab a treat, gentle handheld micro-drift, bright room, the lid slides in-plane no lifting, keep exact board shape
sceny.vo_pl: A w nagrode sam wyjmuje smakolyk.

sceny.first_frame_brief_en: MACRO bright close-up of the black abrasive board top now covered in many pale scratch streaks (proof the claws are being filed), the corgi's tan paw resting on the edge
sceny.last_frame_brief_en: SAME macro then easing to show the calm relaxed corgi sitting content beside the scratched board in the bright room, ears relaxed
sceny.motion_prompt_en: slow gentle reveal from the scratched black surface up to the calm content corgi sitting beside the board, bright airy room, subtle handheld, no morphing, exactly one dog
sceny.vo_pl: Zero szarpania, zero stresu, a pazurki krotkie.
sceny._cut: spokojniejsze ujecie - tnij na oddechu przed CTA

sceny.rola: CTA + LOOP CLOSE (echo hooka: ten sam jasny pokoj, ten sam pies, problem rozwiazany)
sceny.first_frame_brief_en: SAME bright high-key room and camera as the HOOK, same corgi in the same spot on the light-oak floor - but now the Drapek board is in front with the treat lid slid open showing kibble, and the calm happy corgi rests its front paw on the board (RESOLVED echo of the anxious opening)
sceny.last_frame_brief_en: SAME framing: the corgi taps its paw once on the board and looks up content, hero final, bright and warm - mirrors the very first shot's room and light
sceny.motion_prompt_en: the calm corgi rests and lightly taps its paw on the scratch board in the same bright room as the opening, content, subtle handheld micro-drift, the board hero and alive, no morphing, exactly one dog four legs
sceny._cut: LOOP CLOSE: ostatnia klatka = echo jasnego pokoju z hooka; audio ciagle bez akcentu-stopu

loop_close._doc: 0c LOOP CLOSE - petla kompozycyjna: ten sam jasny pokoj + ten sam corgi co w hooku, ale problem (obcinaczki/panika) zamieniony na rozwiazanie (deska/spokoj). Emocjonalna inwersja = petla.
loop_close.first_frame_echo: CTA last frame = jasny high-key pokoj, corgi w tym samym miejscu na jasnej podlodze co w hooku; zamiast obcinaczek - deska, zamiast paniki - spokoj
loop_close.audio_continuity: muzyka plynie przez granice petli bez domkniecia akcentem/fade; ostatni pawtap cichy
loop_close.closing_line_setup: ostatnia linia VO 'Teraz sam prosi o pielegnacje' ustawia pierwsza 'Moj pies wpadal w panike... obcinaczki'

audio.music_brief: warm playful upbeat pet-friendly acoustic-pop bed, light punchy kick and claps driving from second 0, bright ukulele/marimba, feel-good cozy home vibe, radio-ready punchy mix, constant energy until the very end, no outro, no fade out, absolutely no vocals, NO lo-fi, NO ambient; order +60% length (25s) for 14.4s creative

ambient_bed.opis: cichy cieply room-tone jasnego salonu (delikatny szum domu, subtelne echo pokoju), steady seamless, no melody

audio._sfx_regula: kazde WIDOCZNE zdarzenie fizyczne = foley-hit (bramka require_sfx). SYGNATURA = sfx_scratch (drapanie pazurow) glosniej niz muzyka; dip muzyki pod scene scratch.

consistency.produkt: identyczna deska: jasnodrewniany korpus + jedna czarna szorstka powierzchnia + jedna wysuwana czarna pokrywa z czarna petla + jasny drewniany schowek; UNBRANDED (zero PetSpany) - w KAZDEJ scenie (functional_count z KARTY)
consistency.pies: TEN SAM corgi (tan/bialy, duze uszy) we wszystkich scenach - dog-ref warunkuje kazda klatke; zero czarno-podpalanego psa wzorca
consistency.scenografia: ten sam jasny cieply salon (jasna podloga/kremowa sofa) przez calosc; zero szarego dywanu/ciemnego pokoju wzorca
consistency.tekst: zero czytelnych napisow/logo; drewniana krawedz czysta
